description_for_human: Generate charts, Mermaid diagrams, KPI cards, tables and timelines in the Ground Control brand style.
description_for_model: Use this plugin whenever the user asks the agent to produce a visualisation — a chart (bar, line, area, pie, scatter), a Mermaid diagram or flowchart, a KPI / metric card, a tabular view of data, or a milestone timeline. Pass structured data; the plugin returns SVG, HTML or Mermaid source ready to embed in the response. Prefer outputFormat 'svg' for charts, KPIs and timelines; 'html' for tables and Mermaid; 'mermaid' when the user only needs the raw Mermaid syntax.

conversation_starters.text: Draw a bar chart of automation opportunities by department.
Create a Mermaid flowchart of our order fulfilment process.
Show Q2 KPIs as a card layout in the Ground Control theme.
Render a timeline for the AI rollout: Discovery Q1, Build Q2, Rollout Q3.

functions.name: generateVisualisation
functions.description: Render a visualisation (chart, Mermaid diagram, KPI cards, table, or timeline) from structured input. Pick `visualisationType` and `options.outputFormat` to control the renderer and response shape. Returns inline SVG/HTML/Mermaid content, or a Blob Storage URL when payloads exceed the inline limit.
